# Prompts Directory

Prompts in this directory standardize how agents execute work in the meminsight repository.

## Prompts

- opsx-propose.prompt.md
  - Creates an OpenSpec change and generates implementation-ready artifacts.

- opsx-explore.prompt.md
  - Runs exploration-only requirement/problem discovery without coding.

- opsx-apply.prompt.md
  - Implements tasks from an OpenSpec change using schema-aware context files.

- opsx-archive.prompt.md
  - Archives completed OpenSpec changes with artifact/task/sync checks.

## Related guide

- .github/AGENTS_AND_SKILLS_USAGE.md
  - How to use agent modes, skills, and prompts for planning, implementation, review, and archive.
